textByHashes.e634aee15279222bca34345c25fca9d4801199f6: Hello, human. Please be careful around the coral nurseries.
textByHashes.1129d24ce9fcb2c38059cda795acc8a3f6a7d392: Leave the coral nurseries alone please.
textByHashes.0923e465e6aacd90bc4c598adc6d16db2f49021b: Human. Apparently you helped out with a gryphon problem or something. Reggle says you're now trusted enough to use the coral nurseries.
textByHashes.3e2dda4305576e8ddaad4f4636920dae2894c443: I suppose. Which nursery were you thinking of?
textByHashes.343bd9f3c2b23adefe1a7f4b0dd0c4e3792730d8: You haven't put any frags in that nursery yet. Do so and I might agree to look after it for you.
textByHashes.1fc91822a6dd38a1807d1ec0d6aa54c61e2e9529: That depends on whether I have it to sell. What is it that you're looking for?
